r1_parent_policy: Runtime must already exist; create exactly Runtime/ComfyUI if absent; reject files, symlinks, or unsafe parent state.

failed_original_run.root_cause: Runtime/ComfyUI parent was absent and staging mkdir did not request parent creation.

r2_resume_policy: Require exact staging-name-to-INSTALL_OUTPUT binding and full prior evidence integrity before skipping reinstall.
r2_pe_policy: Require AMD64 for all runtime/import binaries; permit only 12 exact path-and-machine reviewed package-resource exceptions.

failed_r1_run.root_cause: Inventory rejected intentional PyOpenGL legacy x86 DLL resources and Setuptools multi-architecture launcher-template resources.
